title: BUBOSTAN Player Totems
body:
### Features
Animated totems of [Bubostan](https://bubostan.fun/) Players.

### How to use:
Rename the totem of undying on anvil by using the keywords specified in the file "keywords.txt " in the archive.

### INSTALLATION:
1. Download [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads)
**OR** [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn).
2. Download Resourcepack.
3. Drop Resourcepack to resourcepack folder.
